response.overview: Kean, the son of a house caretaker, spends most of his childhood with Ivan, the son of the homeowners. Despite their different backgrounds, the two boys become inseparable, spending their days playing on a hill where their friendship feels untouched by time.  Their world begins to change when Ivan reveals that his family may soon migrate to Hawaii. Unwilling to let their friendship fade, the boys create a list of childhood adventures they call “missions,” hoping to hold on to the bond they once believed would last forever.  But as departure day slowly approaches, the missions begin to feel less like games and more like attempts to delay the inevitable. Faced with unspoken fears, quiet distance, and the reality of growing up, Kean and Ivan are forced to confront how time can change even the closest friendships.
response.title: Noon na lang ang Noon
